title: TakoVM – open-source sandboxing for your agent's code
abstract: Hey you! Imagine your code monsters having fun in the TakoVM open sandbox, safely and entertainingly. Whether you're a coding guru or a newbie, this place is perfect for trying out new programming magic. Join us and let's weave a magical world with code together!
abstract_zh: Hey 你！想象一下，你的代码小怪兽们在TakoVM这个开放沙盒里自由玩耍，安全又有趣！无论你是开发大神还是新手小白，都可以来这儿试一试新奇的编程魔法。快来加入吧，让我们一起用代码编织奇幻世界！
